Title: Relates to coverage for New Yorkers losing insurance due to the implementation of HR 1
Summary: Provides for coverage for New Yorkers losing insurance due to the implementation of HR 1.
LawCode: Add Art 2 Title 7 §268-i, Pub Health L; amd §369-gg, Soc Serv L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law and the social services law, in relation to coverage for New Yorkers losing insurance due to the implementation of HR 1
